title: Delete command (Project menu)
description:
Delete command (Project menu)

Delete command (Project menu)

This command deletes an entire project from a PC disk. All files in the project folder will be destroyed.

Item	Description

Project
		 save destination	Select
		 the project save destination to delete.

Select
		 Project to delete	Select
		 a project to delete from the list.

Delete	Delete
		 the project. You will be prompted to confirm the operation.

Cancel	Cancels
		 the operation and closes the dialog.
